batch.title: Credits System
batch.description: Subscription credits are valid for the plan period, and other credits follow their issued batch expiry. Track usage, monitor consumption, and top up whenever you need.

multilingual.title: Dark Mode
multilingual.description: A polished dark theme designed for long creative sessions. Switch effortlessly between light and dark to match your mood.

Testimonials.label: Testimonials
Testimonials.title: What Creators Say
Testimonials.subtitle: Designers, marketers, and developers around the world are using {brandName} every day.

items.content: The chat interface makes image generation feel effortless. I can describe what I'm imagining in plain language and iterate until it's perfect.
items.author: Sarah Lin

items.content: Batch generation saves me hours every week. I can produce a dozen hero image variations for A/B testing without breaking a sweat.
items.author: Michael Zhang

items.content: I signed up and had my first batch of images within minutes. The interface is incredibly intuitive — just describe what you want and the AI nails it.
items.author: Emily Chen

items.content: The gallery is how I stay organized. Every image I've ever generated is searchable, taggable, and a click away from being reused.
items.author: David Wang

items.content: The balance and expiry reminders are clear. I can use credits at my own creative pace and top up before a batch expires.
items.author: Lisa Li

items.content: {brandName} replaced three other tools in my workflow. Chat-based prompting, batch runs, and a stunning gallery — it's everything in one place.
items.author: Kevin Zhao

FAQ.label: FAQ
FAQ.title: Questions You Might Have
FAQ.subtitle: Common questions about {brandName} and how it works.

items.question: What is {brandName}?
items.answer: {brandName} is an AI-powered platform that turns natural-language conversations into high-quality images. Describe what you want, and our AI generates it — no prompt engineering required. Features include chat-to-image generation, a visual gallery, batch generation, and a flexible credits system.

items.question: Which AI image models are supported?
items.answer: {brandName} supports the leading image generation models on the market, including GPT Image 2. Just sign up, choose a plan, and start generating — the platform handles model routing and delivers results in a unified interface.

items.question: How does the credits system work?
items.answer: Every image generation consumes credits based on output pixels and moderation checks. Subscription credits are valid for the matching plan period, while other credits follow the batch expiry shown on the usage page.

items.question: How do I get started?
items.answer: Just sign up for a free account — no credit card required. You'll receive starter credits to try out image generation immediately. When you're ready for more, choose a subscription plan that fits your needs.

items.question: Does batch generation cost more?
items.answer: Batch generation consumes credits per image generated, the same as single generation. It's a convenience feature that lets you produce multiple variations in one request — perfect for exploring concepts or iterating on designs quickly.

items.question: Can I download and use the images commercially?
items.answer: Yes. Images you generate on {brandName} are yours to use — for personal, editorial, or commercial projects. Downloads are available in high resolution, and your full generation history stays in your gallery.

CTA.badge: Start free, no credit card required

CTA.subtitle: Sign up in seconds and get free credits to try {brandName}. Bring your ideas to life with AI-powered image generation.
